note: Conversation scenarios. Each pulls target vocab from everyday.json clusters (by id). Add scenarios as Reza's units grow; cluster:null = free chat.

scenarios.goal: Greet each other, introduce yourself, and say a little about your family.
scenarios.success: You have exchanged greetings and names and said one or two things about your family.

scenarios.goal: Describe who is in your family — parents, children, grandparents, aunts and uncles.
scenarios.opener: أَخْبِرْني عَنْ أُسْرَتِكَ. مَنْ في بَيْتِكَ؟
scenarios.openerTr: akhbirnī ʿan usratika. man fī baytika?
scenarios.success: You have named several family members and said one thing about each.

scenarios.goal: Ask the price of something, bargain, and agree to buy it (or politely decline).
scenarios.opener: أَهْلاً! تَفَضَّلْ، ماذا تُريدُ أَنْ تَشْتَرِيَ؟
scenarios.openerTr: ahlan! tafaḍḍal, mādhā turīdu an tashtariya?
scenarios.success: You asked a price, negotiated, and reached a decision.

scenarios.goal: Order food and drink, then ask for the bill.
scenarios.opener: أَهْلاً وَسَهْلاً! تَفَضَّلْ، ماذا تُحِبُّ أَنْ تَأْكُلَ؟
scenarios.openerTr: ahlan wa-sahlan! tafaḍḍal, mādhā tuḥibbu an taʾkula?
scenarios.success: You ordered at least one food and one drink and asked for the bill.

scenarios.goal: Ask how to reach a place and understand the directions you are given.
scenarios.success: You asked the way to a place and repeated the directions back correctly.

scenarios.goal: Talk about your prayer, wudu, and going to the mosque.
scenarios.opener: هَلْ صَلَّيْتَ الفَجْرَ في المَسْجِدِ اليَوْمَ؟
scenarios.openerTr: hal ṣallayta l-fajra fī l-masjidi l-yawma?
scenarios.success: You described your prayer routine using several worship words.

scenarios.goal: Take a taxi to your hotel and check in.
scenarios.success: You told a driver where to go and completed a short hotel check-in.

scenarios.goal: Just talk about anything, staying within my current vocabulary.
scenarios.success: You kept a friendly back-and-forth going for several turns.
